title: Crowded counter with overlapping bottles

form_data.description: JSON wrong brand name, label correct

image_prompt: Photorealistic square glass bottle with a black and white classic label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Smoky Hollow', 'Tennessee Whiskey', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Smoky Hollow Distillery, Nashville, TN'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: multiple bottles overlap on a counter with glare and mixed labels. The reviewer must isolate the product before comparison.
